text:
INCIDENT REPORT #010
Facility: Plant 7 - Baton Rouge
Asset: Generator GEN-3
Severity: LOW

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed oil leakage at the shaft seal
on the Generator GEN-3. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 0.7 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be a failed lubrication pump.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
